channel.title: Integrated Security Specialist Blog
channel.description: Elite integrated security consultant combining cybersecurity, physical security, maritime security, and executive protection.

item.title: Why Integrated Security Matters for Critical Infrastructure
item.description: Cyber and physical security are no longer separate disciplines. Organizations that treat them as isolated functions leave critical gaps in their defense posture.

item.title: Maritime Security in the Age of Cyber-Physical Threats
item.description: Modern vessel operations depend on interconnected systems. ISPS compliance alone is insufficient without addressing the cyber dimension of maritime security.

item.title: Executive Protection: Professional Competencies, Not Hollywood Tactics
item.description: Executive security is built on planning, awareness, and de-escalation—not aggression. Understanding the professional standards behind close protection.
